mapper.update: UPDATE table_reservations SET status = #{status} WHERE reservation_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{code}
SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(reservation_id, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')
SELECT reservation_id FROM table_reservations WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{tableId}, reserved_table_ids) AND status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'DELAYED') ORDER BY reservation_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT reservation_id, reservation_time, within_15h, customer_name, customer_phone, table_selection_mode, table_config_desc, group_type, status, pre_order FROM table_reservations WHERE status IN ('PRE_CONFIRMED', 'DELAYED') AND pre_order = 1 ORDER BY CASE WHEN within_15h = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, reservation_time ASC

SELECT reservation_id, reservation_time, rescheduled_time, within_15h, customer_name, customer_phone, table_selection_mode, table_config_desc, group_type, status FROM table_reservations WHERE status IN ('PRE_CONFIRMED', 'DELAYED') AND table_selection_mode = 'QUANTITY' ORDER BY CASE WHEN within_15h = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, reservation_time ASC

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, rescheduled_time, table_count, table_config_desc, group_type, reserved_table_ids, table_selection_mode, manual_table_numbers, status, within_15h, pre_order AS preOrder, is_prepaid AS isPrepaid, prepaid_amount AS prepaidAmount, notes, created_at FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{id}

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_count, table_config_desc, group_type, reserved_table_ids, table_selection_mode, manual_table_numbers, status, within_15h, pre_order, is_prepaid, prepaid_amount, notes, created_at FROM table_reservations WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{tableId}, reserved_table_ids) AND status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY reservation_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_config_desc, table_selection_mode, status, notes FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{codeFragment}, '%') AND status IN ('PRE_CONFIRMED', 'DELAYED') ORDER BY reservation_time DESC

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_config_desc, table_selection_mode, status, notes FROM table_reservations WHERE customer_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phoneLast4}) AND status IN ('PRE_CONFIRMED', 'DELAYED') ORDER BY reservation_time DESC

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_count, table_config_desc, group_type, reserved_table_ids, table_selection_mode, manual_table_numbers, status, within_15h, pre_order AS preOrder, is_prepaid AS isPrepaid, prepaid_amount AS prepaidAmount, notes, created_at FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{codeFragment}, '%')
AND status IN ('PRE_CONFIRMED', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY reservation_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE table_reservations
reservation_time = #{reservationTime},
table_count = #{tableCount},
table_config_desc = #{tableConfigDesc},
group_type = #{groupType},
pre_order = #{preOrder},
is_prepaid = #{isPrepaid},
prepaid_amount = #{prepaidAmount},
notes = #{notes},
within_15h = #{within15h},
WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_count, table_config_desc, group_type, reserved_table_ids, table_selection_mode, manual_table_numbers, status, within_15h, pre_order AS preOrder, is_prepaid AS isPrepaid, prepaid_amount AS prepaidAmount, notes, created_at FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{codeFragment}, '%') AND status IN ('PRE_CONFIRMED', 'CONFIRMED', 'NO_SHOW', 'DELAYED') ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'PRE_CONFIRMED' THEN 1 WHEN 'CONFIRMED' THEN 2 WHEN 'DELAYED' THEN 3 WHEN 'NO_SHOW' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, reservation_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forfeited_deposits ( reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, forfeited_amount, cancellation_reason ) VALUES ( #{reservationId}, #{customerName}, #{customerPhone}, #{reservationTime}, #{forfeitedAmount}, #{reason} )
mapper.select: SELECT is_prepaid, prepaid_amount FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
